articles.title: Ben & Jerry’s Foundation says it will shut down amid legal dispute with parent company
articles.description:
The Vermont-based iconic ice cream brand has been in a legal fight with The Magnum Ice Cream Co. — an ice-cream spinoff of the larger corporation Unilever — since November 2024.

The post Ben & Jerry’s Foundation says it will shut down amid legal dispute with parent company appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Ben & Jerry's Foundation will shut down due to a legal dispute with Unilever.
The legal fight with The Magnum Ice Cream Co. began in November 2024.
Boston residents may lose local funding and support from the foundation's community initiatives.

articles.title: FDA approves a first-of-its-kind pill to cut cholesterol in high-risk patients
articles.description:
The drug from Merck was OK'd on Thursday for patients with artery-clogging cholesterol that persists even after taking statins, the standard medications for cutting heart attack risk.

The post FDA approves a first-of-its-kind pill to cut cholesterol in high-risk patients appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: FDA approves Merck's new cholesterol pill for high-risk patients on July 16, 2026.
The drug targets patients with persistent artery-clogging cholesterol despite statin use.
Boston residents may see improved heart health options for high-risk individuals.

articles.title: Jayson Tatum says its ‘weird’ that Jaylen Brown is no longer a Celtic
articles.description:
"You feel those emotions. The city feels those emotions," Tatum said.

The post Jayson Tatum says its ‘weird’ that Jaylen Brown is no longer a Celtic appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum expressed emotions over Jaylen Brown's trade from the Celtics.
Tatum noted the city's shared feelings about Brown's departure on July 16, 2026.
The trade may affect team dynamics and fan support in Boston.

articles.title: How many first-round picks would Drake Maye be worth?
articles.description:
One ESPN writer said Maye would be worth at least six, so here's a look at notable QB trades from the past.

The post How many first-round picks would Drake Maye be worth? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: ESPN writer estimates Drake Maye's trade value at six first-round picks.
Notable QB trades analyzed to contextualize Maye's potential worth.
Boston Patriots may consider Maye if they seek a franchise quarterback.
